intro_cards.title: Contrast Conjunction: けど
intro_cards.body:
けど (also けれど, けれども) means 'but' or 'although.' It also softens statements.

• 行きたいけど、時間がない。
(I want to go, but I don't have time.)
• 高いけど、おいしいです。(It's expensive but delicious.)

Softening / introducing a topic politely:
• 聞きたいことがあるんですけど…
(There's something I wanted to ask... — polite hesitation)

Formality: が (formal) > けれども > けれど > けど (casual)

けど is very natural in everyday conversation.
